channel.title: Heroku on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Heroku on Mike Ball

item.title: Automating Product Availability Alerts
item.description: Too much internet. Automate your web browsing.

item.title: Deploying an Express App to Heroku
item.description: A beginner's tutorial in deploying a Node.js app to Heroku.

item.title: Using South on a Heroku-hosted Django Project
item.description: How to add new fields to an existing, Heroku-hosted Django project's database.
